demo_timestamps.description: Co-pilot studio asking questions regarding data
MCP server fetching data from fabric services
Introduction and importance of sustainability in design
Introduction to data pipeline automation with Autodesk Construction Cloud APIs
Creating unique assemblies and assigning product codes
Execution of the pipeline in Microsoft Fabric

ai_technologies.name: Co-Pilot
ai_technologies.context: Integrated into Microsoft Fabric for querying data

ai_technologies.name: MCP
ai_technologies.context: MCP server from the data agent to fetch data

summary: The video discusses the automation of sustainability metrics using Autodesk Platform Services, Microsoft Fabric, and AI co-pilot technology. It highlights the process of building data pipelines to automatically generate data related to sustainability from ACC models. The speaker demonstrates the use of these technologies to create unique assemblies, assign product codes, and use AI to analyze environmental impact data for infrastructure projects.
